top_patterns.description: Open with personal insight or story, then invite engagement or reflection.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal insight/story + reflection + call to action/link
example_quotes: This is from a conversation I just had with Kevin Love on No Magic No Pill, where he shared simple tools for navigating anxiety and his mental health journey.
My first business didn’t start with a vision. It started with an injury and a pile of dirty laundry.

top_patterns.description: State an affirmation or core message, then reinforce with a reminder or supportive phrase.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: Frequently in posts about worth, healing, and impact
example_quotes: You are enough, exactly as you are.

top_patterns.description: Pose a gentle question to prompt self-reflection or awareness.
top_patterns.when_it_appears: In captions about mental health, clarity, or growth
example_quotes: This question gently realigns choices with care, clarity, and long-term well-being.
If you’re feeling off, make your own. Name what you need.

archetypal_structures.formula: Personal story + lesson learned + invitation or call to action
archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Build connection, share vulnerability, inspire action
example_quotes: I learned early that problems make great teachers if you’re willing to pay attention.
Healing didn’t come from chasing another rush. It came from slowing down and rebuilding my baseline.

archetypal_structures.formula: Core affirmation + visual symbol or product + supportive message
example_quotes: ENOUGH exists as a simple reminder, you are not alone in what you’re carrying.
This bracelet was inspired by the idea that a small, visible symbol can create connection.

bridge_phrases: That lesson is part of why...
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences with occasional longer reflections
language_habits.line_break_style: Often uses line breaks for emphasis, especially before key statements or questions

example_quotes: My deepest wound was believing I wasn’t enough.
From the inside, I was struggling.
You are enough, exactly as you are.
I learned early that problems make great teachers.

anti_patterns: Generic motivational quotes without personal context
Calls to action that are vague or non-specific
Overuse of hashtags without narrative context
Lack of personal voice or authenticity

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice is deeply personal, affirming, and focused on healing and self-worth, with a consistent pattern of storytelling and reminders.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct, vulnerability-focused, and centered on mental health and self-acceptance, less about external achievement.
